## Description

What does this PR do? Link the issue it closes: Closes #XXX

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Tests only

## Testing

Describe how you tested this. New tests added?

- [ ] I ran `pytest` and all tests pass
- [ ] I ran `ruff check src tests` and there are no linting errors
- [ ] I added tests for my changes

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guide (run `ruff check`)
- [ ] I've updated docs/getting-started.md if my change affects user-facing behaviour
- [ ] I've updated CHANGELOG.md under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] This PR is focused on one thing (not combining unrelated changes)
